title: Dog Daycare Attendant - Full Time
description:
Dog Daycare Attendant → Future Manager

Love dogs and want a career, not just a job? Start as a daycare attendant and we’ll train and support you to grow into a management position.

Company:

Up For Paws (31 Eng Kong Terrace, Singapore 599004)

Pay: From SGD $2,500 - $3,000

Job description:

We are looking for a responsible and caring candidate to join our team. We are the leading force-free dog daycare in Singapore who believes in enrichment and socialisation for dogs in a fun and safe environment. We have been featured on Channel News Asia and The New Paper. Join our growing team today!

Daycare Duties & Responsibilities:
- Communicate with dogs using positive reinforcement.
- Teach dogs basic commands & enrichment activities
- Dog Safety: 2 staff monitors dog playgroups by reading dog body language
- Dog Walks & Dog Parks: 2 staff takes a group of dogs our for walks or off-leash dog park
- Feed, clean up after and bathe dogs
– Take pictures and update clients

Requirements:
- Have a Class 3A driving license
– Willingness to learn positive reinforcement and Force Free Training methods
- Communicate with staff and clients with respect and kindness
– Previous experience with dogs
– Responsible and self driven
– Love to work in a tight-knit team
- Able to use mobile apps such as whatsapp, google maps and google calendar

Working hours:
- Daycare is open on weekdays Mon to Fri. Weekends and PH are closed.
- Typical shift time is from Mon-Fri 9:00a - 6:00p
- Weekend WFH rotation (replying to customers via Whatsapp)

Work culture we strive for at Up For Paws:
– Kind, connection, gratitude, fun, authentic and learning

If you are interested please apply immediately.

Job Type: Full-time

Work Location: In person

postedCompany.description:
Up For Paws is a Singapore dog daycare that believes in positive reinforcement and rewards-based dog training and communication. Our passion stems from the belief that responsible dog ownership and force-free communication creates a strong and lasting bond between dogs and their owners.


Facebook: www.facebook.com/upforpaws

Instagram: instagram.com/upforpaws
